holdings.infoBox: QLVD is an equity ETF with a total of 191 individual holdings. The top holdings are Novartis AG stock at 3.81%, Royal Bank of Canada at 2.93%, ASML Holding at 2.70%, Unilever at 2.17%, and Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce at 1.81%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Developed Markets ex-US Quality Low Volatility Index Fund (QLVD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap equities from developed markets excluding the US. Holdings are selected for quality and low volatility. QLVD was launched on Jul 15, 2019 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Northern Trust Developed Markets ex-US Quality Low Volatility Index
